case_title: CCSF, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION vs. HOPKINS, ANNETTE AKA ANNETTE MAE HOPKINS AKA et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT HOPKINS, ANNETTE AKA ANNETTE MAE HOPKINS AKA ANNETTE MAE MARTIN DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-28-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-30-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-08-1995
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOPKINS, ANNETTE AKA ANNETTE MAE HOPKINS AKA ANNETTE MAE MARTIN $7,240.89 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,240.89
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

NO ADDRESS IN FILE OR REGISTER FOR DEFT; JUDGMENT FOR DEFT WAS MAILED TO LISA A. GRAY, D.C.A. TO MAIL TO DEFT; MR. GRAY ALSO ASKED TO PROVIDE MUNI CT. WITH AN ADDRESS FOR DEFT. JUDGMENT ENTERED DUE TO THE STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED 2/6/95.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
